2603.21340.title: ARYA: A Physics-Constrained Composable & Deterministic World Model Architecture
2603.21340.paper_summary: This paper presents ARYA, a composable, physics-constrained, deterministic world model architecture built on five foundational principles: nano models, composability, causal reasoning, determinism, and architectural AI safety. We demonstrate that ARYA satisfies all canonical world model requirements, including state representation, dynamic prediction, causal and physical awareness, temporal consistency, generalization, learnability, and planning and control. Unlike monolithic foundation models, the ARYA foundation model implements these capabilities through a hierarchical system-of-system-of-systems of specialized nano models, orchestrated by AARA (ARYA Autonomous Research Agent), an always-on cognitive daemon that executes a continuous sense-decide-act-learn loop. The nano model architecture provides linear scaling, sparse activation, selective untraining, and sub-20-second training cycles, resolving the traditional tension between capability and computational efficiency. A central contribution is the Unfireable Safety Kernel: an architecturally immutable safety boundary that cannot be disabled or circumvented by any system component, including its own self-improvement engine. This is not a social or ethical alignment statement; it is a technical framework ensuring human control persists as autonomy increases. Safety is an architectural constraint governing every operation, not a policy layer applied after the fact. We present formal alignment between ARYA's architecture and canonical world model requirements, and report summarizing its state-of-the-art performance across 6 of 9 competitive benchmarks head-to-head with GPT-5.2, Opus 4.6, and V-JEPA-2. All with zero neural network parameters, across seven active industry domain nodes spanning aerospace, pharma manufacturing, oil and gas, smart cities, biotech, defense, and medical devices.
2603.21340.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了ARYA，一種可組合的、受物理約束的、確定性的世界模型架構，基於五個基本原則：納米模型、可組合性、因果推理、確定性和架構AI安全性。我們展示了ARYA滿足所有經典世界模型的要求，包括狀態表示、動態預測、因果和物理意識、時間一致性、泛化、可學習性以及規劃和控制。與單一的基礎模型不同，ARYA基礎模型通過一個層次化的系統-系統-系統架構來實現這些能力，這些專門的納米模型由AARA（ARYA自主研究代理）協調，AARA是一個始終在線的認知守護進程，執行持續的感知-決策-行動-學習循環。納米模型架構提供線性擴展、稀疏激活、選擇性去訓練和低於20秒的訓練周期，解決了能力與計算效率之間的傳統緊張關係。一個核心貢獻是不可撤銷的安全內核：一個架構上不可變的安全邊界，無法被任何系統組件，包括其自身的自我改進引擎禁用或繞過。這不是一個社會或倫理對齊聲明；它是一個技術框架，確保隨著自主性增加，人類控制持續存在。安全性是一個架構約束，支配每一個操作，而不是事後施加的政策層。我們展示了ARYA的架構與經典世界模型要求之間的正式對齊，並報告了其在9個競爭基準中的6個方面與GPT-5.2、Opus 4.6和V-JEPA-2的正面競爭的最先進性能。所有這些都在零神經網絡參數的情況下，涵蓋了七個活躍的行業領域節點，包括航空航天、製藥製造、石油和天然氣、智慧城市、生物技術、防禦和醫療設備。
2603.21340.author: Seth Dobrin et.al.
